case_title: ROBERT KEARNS VS. JOHN D. LAU et al

ARBITRATOR WILLIAM BENJAMIN SMITH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-29-2011 THROUGH OCT-27-2011.
